authors: The community (Roll20,Reddit,Pinterest,ecc.) if with link put in the description of monster

trait.name: Rampage
entries: When the gnoll reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the gnoll can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Aura of Blood Thirst
entries: If the flind isn't {@condition incapacitated}, any creature with the Rampage trait can mabe a bute attack as a bonus action while within 10 feet of the find.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The flind makes three atracks: one with each of its different flail attacks or three with its longbow.

action.name: Flail of Madness
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save,
the creature must make a melee attack against a random target within its reach on its next turn. If has no targets within is reach even after moving, it loses its action on that turn.

action.name: Flail of Pain
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, plus 22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage.

action.name: Flail of Paralysis
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition paralyzed} until the end of its next turn,

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d8}) piercing damage.
A gnoll war band might include one or more of the special kinds of gnolls described in this section.
A flind is an exceptionally strong and vicious gnoll that commands and directs the war band it is a part of it wields is a flail imbued with powerful magic by Yeenoghu himself.

A war band can have only one flind, and that creature sets a war band’s path Because of its special connection to Yeenoghu, a flind uses god-given omens and demonic insight to guide the gnoils toward weak prey ripe for slaughter.
Unlike other humanoid leaders that migh: sine behind their minions, a find teads the charge in battle. rein those struck by it.
